name: Beef and Vegetable Medley
recipeIngredient: 1 package Long grain & wild rice mix (4 to 6-1/2 ounces)
1 lb Boneless beef sirloin steak (cut in strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the rice mix according to the package instructions.
2. Season the beef with salt and black pepper; brown in oil in a large skillet over high heat.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients except rice; stir-fry 3 to 4 minutes or until vegetables are tender crisp.
4. Stir in the rice; heat thoroughly.
Each serving provides:
334 calories
28.6 grams protein
12.2 grams fat
26.4 grams carbohydrate
970 milligrams sodium
74 milligrams cholesterol
Source: Cooking with Rice
Reprinted with permission from The USA Rice Council
